Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.core.TerminationCondition

Packages that use TerminationCondition
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.termination
Defines conditions for terminating runs.

  • Uses of TerminationCondition in org.moeaframework

    Methods in org.moeaframework that return TerminationCondition
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected TerminationCondition
    Executor.createTerminationCondition()
    Returns the termination condition for this executor.
    Methods in org.moeaframework with parameters of type TerminationCondition
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Executor
    Executor.withTerminationCondition(TerminationCondition condition)
    Adds a custom termination condition for use with this executor.

  • Uses of TerminationCondition in org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa that implement TerminationCondition
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TemperatureBasedTerminationCondition
    Terminates a simulated annealing algorithm when the temperature drops below a stopping, or minimum, temperature.

  • Uses of TerminationCondition in org.moeaframework.core

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core with parameters of type TerminationCondition
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    Algorithm.run(TerminationCondition terminationCondition)
    Executes this algorithm until the terminal condition signals it to stop.

  • Uses of TerminationCondition in org.moeaframework.core.termination

    Classes in org.moeaframework.core.termination that implement TerminationCondition
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CompoundTerminationCondition
    Terminates a run when one or more termination conditions are satisfied.
    class 
    MaxElapsedTime
    Terminates a run when the maximum elapsed time is exceeded.
    class 
    MaxFunctionEvaluations
    Terminates a run when the maximum number of function evaluations is exceeded.
    class 
    TargetObjectiveTermination
    Terminates a run when at least one solution in the result is equal to or within some allowed difference (epsilon) from a target solution.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.core.termination with parameters of type TerminationCondition
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    CompoundTerminationCondition(TerminationCondition... conditions)
    Constructs a new termination condition based on at least one individual termination condition being satisfied.
